final_prompt.prompt:
Design a brand board for "Nända", a jewelry brand for girls.

Style/medium:
  Bright, colorful, youthful aesthetic
  Doodle icons incorporated throughout
  Fun and elegant balance — expressive, personality-driven

Composition:
  Full brand board layout including all brand elements:
  — Primary logo
  — Secondary logo
  — Circular submark
  — Full color palette swatches
  — Font pairings (display + body)
  — Brand patterns / surface patterns

Subject:
  "Nända" jewelry brand identity system for girls
  Brand personality: youthful, creative, colorful, fun, elegant

Scene/backdrop:
  Brand board / style guide layout on clean background

Lighting/mood:
  Vibrant, playful, upbeat — expressive and joyful

Color palette:
  Bright, colorful multi-color palette befitting a youthful jewelry brand for girls

Materials/textures:
  Doodle-style illustrated icons and decorative elements woven into patterns and logo marks

Text (verbatim):
  Nända

Constraints:
  All elements must feel cohesive as a single brand system
  Doodle icons should complement, not overwhelm, the elegant side of the brand

Avoid:
  Dull, muted, or corporate color schemes
  Overly childish or toy-like aesthetic that loses elegance
  Generic sans-serif-only typography with no personality
